prompt: Create a romantic dark-fantasy anime illustration of a tall silver-haired nobleman embracing a petite long-haired woman on an ornate castle balcony at night. The composition is a close, intimate waist-up portrait: the man stands on the left, broad-shouldered, leaning down toward the woman as if about to kiss her forehead; the woman stands on the right, pressed against his chest, one hand clutching the chain and pendant on his coat while his black-gloved hand wraps protectively around her waist. Obscure both faces with two soft-edged muted gray-brown rectangular blocks, one larger square over the man's face and one vertical rectangle over the woman's face, while leaving the hair, clothing, and embrace visible. The man has windswept silver-white hair, pale skin, a black high-collared gothic uniform, a dark cloak or mantle, leather gloves, layered gold chains, and large star-shaped crystal cross pendants. The woman has very long dark hair with jeweled star hair ornaments, a royal blue and white embroidered dress with gold filigree details, delicate earrings, and translucent layered sleeves. Set the scene in a luminous midnight blue palace garden balcony with elaborate wrought-iron railings, Gothic spires, glowing windows, hanging lanterns, blue roses, tiny fairy lights, drifting sparkles, and a star-filled sky. Use a rich blue, violet, silver, and warm lantern-gold palette, dramatic rim lighting on hair and shoulders, highly detailed fabric embroidery and jewelry, painterly anime rendering, cinematic depth of field, soft bloom, romantic melancholy atmosphere, no text, no watermark.
